mapper.sql: select pi.unit , pi.product_info_id , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 , pse.status_name , pi.specification , pi.serial_number , pi.min_stock , pi.category , pi.product_name , pi.barcode , pi.brand , pi.shelf_life FROM product_info pi left join product_status_enum pse on pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 = pse.product_status_enum_id
mapper.select: select pi.unit , pi.product_info_id , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 , pse.status_name , pi.specification , pi.serial_number , pi.min_stock , pi.category , pi.product_name , pi.barcode , pi.brand , pi.shelf_life ,images.resource_id as images_resource_id ,images.resource_name as images_resource_name ,images.resource_path as images_resource_path ,images.related_table_name as images_related_table_name ,images.related_table_key as images_related_table_key ,images.relate_table_column_name as images_relate_table_column_name FROM product_info pi left join product_status_enum pse on pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 = pse.product_status_enum_id left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='product_info' and relate_table_column_name='images') as images on images.related_table_key=pi.product_info_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select pi.unit , pi.product_info_id , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 , pse.status_name , pi.specification , pi.serial_number , pi.min_stock , pi.category , pi.product_name , pi.barcode , pi.brand , pi.shelf_life FROM product_info pi left join product_status_enum pse on pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 = pse.product_status_enum_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select pi.unit , pi.product_info_id , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 , pse.status_name , pi.specification , pi.serial_number , pi.min_stock , pi.category , pi.product_name , pi.barcode , pi.brand , pi.shelf_life FROM product_info pi left join product_status_enum pse on pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 = pse.product_status_enum_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select pi.unit , pi.product_info_id , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 , pse.status_name , pi.specification , pi.serial_number , pi.min_stock , pi.category , pi.product_name , pi.barcode , pi.brand , pi.shelf_life FROM product_info pi left join product_status_enum pse on pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 = pse.product_status_enum_id where pi.product_info_id = #{id}
select count(*) FROM product_info pi left join product_status_enum pse on pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 = pse.product_status_enum_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
